heading: View Suggested Indexes
body:
To return suggested indexes for collections experiencing slow queries using the
Atlas CLI, run the following command:

```sh

atlas performanceAdvisor suggestedIndexes list [options]

```

To learn more about the command syntax and parameters, see the
Atlas CLI documentation for [atlas performanceAdvisor suggestedIndexes list](atlas/cli/current/command/atlas-performanceAdvisor-suggestedIndexes-list).
